scenario: Adverse Event — structured MedWatch 3500A-style form (key-value layout, scanned).
input_text:
FORM: FDA MEDWATCH 3500A (VOLUNTARY)
FIELD A.1 Patient Initials: R.T.
FIELD A.2 Age: 67    A.3 Sex: M
FIELD B.1 Outcome: Hospitalized
FIELD B.5 Describe Event: Patient developed severe muscle pain and dark urine approximately one week after starting CholoClear-X 50mg; admitted for suspected rhabdomyolysis.
FIELD C.1 Suspect Product: CholoClear-X 50mg oral
FIELD D.1 Reporter: Dr. S. Okonkwo, MD — Cleveland, OH
labeling_notes: Adverse event presented as a structured form (key-value), not prose -> tests form parsing.
Serious (hospitalization). Routes to PV via Gate 4.
